## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Smith.ai to discuss content strategy, SEO, and interactive tools development.](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New interactive tools (invoice template, incident report) developed for Smith.ai website to increase user engagement and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [SEO analysis shows recent traffic drop; detailed report coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Technical implementation needed for PDF conversion and email functionality for interactive tools](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Design quality issues identified; feedback to be addressed with design team](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

## Topics

### Dog Agility Event (Small Talk)

  - [Maddy involved in dog agility club organizing trials/competitions](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Event affected by weather (high 40s, raining)](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Buffalo area known for high-level agility trainers and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### SEO and Analytics Update

  - [Elvis preparing detailed analytics report with Loom video](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Significant traffic loss observed, particularly on 5 blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Google updates may have affected content ranking](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Increased content creation capacity with two new full-time content managers](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

### Interactive Tools Development

  - [New invoice template created with editable fields and local file integration](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Multi-step incident report form developed with save functionality](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Technical challenges: HTML to PDF conversion, email integration needed](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Vol (developer) to be consulted on implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### Design and Layout Concerns

  - [Misalignment issues in numbered list design identified](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Maddy emphasized need for higher design quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Suggestion to review designer hiring/quality control process](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Table Implementation in Content

  - [Discussion on best practices for presenting tabular data](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [HTML tables not recommended due to mobile responsiveness issues](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Alternatives: graphics, column lists, or custom Webflow components](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Example of well-implemented responsive table on Smith.ai website shown](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to create and share Loom video explaining SEO/traffic changes](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Reiterate technical requirements for interactive tools to Vol](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Address design quality issues with design team](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Explore Webflow component options for responsive tables in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Vol to discuss technical implementation of interactive tools](https://fathom.video/share/CM4hYwtvMpZmKmZeTLq2cJDbs815J7zg?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
